nasb.text: It is the Spirit who gives life; the flesh profits nothing; the words that I have spoken to you are spirit and are life.

esv.text: It is the Spirit who gives life; the flesh is no help at all. The words that I have spoken to you are spirit and life.

cnv.text: 使人活的是靈，肉體是無濟於事的。我對你們所說的話是靈、是生命。

ccb.text: 叫人活着的是灵，肉体毫无作用。我对你们说的话就是灵，就是生命。

csbs.text: 赐人生命的是灵，肉体没有什么用。我对你们说的话就是灵，就是生命。
